activeEnvironment.title: Active Environment:
activeEnvironment.configureHint: Configure Production or Sandbox to activate Airwallex payments.
environmentSettings.title: {{environment}} settings
environmentSettings.demo.description: Test payment flows without real money
environmentSettings.production.descripti: Accept real payments and settle funds
environmentSettings.emptyState.demo.desc: Add your credentials to simulate the checkout experience.
environmentSettings.emptyState.productio: Add your credentials to start processing live transactions.
credentials.title: Environment credentials
credentials.description: Connect your Airwallex account to process payments and sync data
credentials.hint: Generate credentials in Airwallex Developer settings.
webhook.urlHint: Copy this URL and paste it into Airwallex settings to generate your webhook secret key
paymentMethods.title: Payment methods
paymentMethods.description: Select the payment options to display at checkout
captureMethod.title: Payment capture method
captureMethod.description: If "Authorise only" is selected, you will need to manually capture the funds in Airwallex. Payments made using methods that don't support hold will still be automatically captured.
editDisabled.tooltip: Save or cancel your open edits to configure this environment.
modal.enableLivePayments.title: Enable live payments?
modal.enableLivePayments.message: Your store will stop routing to Sandbox and immediately begin processing real transactions
modal.disableLivePayments.title: Disable live payments?
modal.disableLivePayments.message: Switching to Sandbox will stop your store from processing real transactions. All new checkouts will be routed to your test environment.
quickLinks.title: Quick links
errors.paymentMethodTypesNotConfigured: Payment method types endpoint is not configured
errors.failedToFetchPaymentMethodTypes: Failed to fetch payment method types
